ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_website" TEXT /* URL of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., open, closed, holiday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the symbol is traded */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock symbol */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Industry sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_symbols_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading data record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being traded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open" INTEGER /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" INTEGER /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" INTEGER /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" INTEGER /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "pre_market_price" INTEGER /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" INTEGER /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "price_change" INTEGER /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "adjusted_close" INTEGER /* Adjusted closing price, considering splits and dividends */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in trading volume from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading data record being analyzed */,
  "stock_trading" INTEGER /* Calculated stock trading value */,
  "market_trend" TEXT /* Calculated market trend (e.g., bull, bear) */,
  "moving_average_50" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "moving_average_200" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index to measure the stock's momentum */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence to identify trends */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Measure of the stock's price fluctuation */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment analysis score based on news and social media */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trading_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp to track user activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
